inputs.label: Projectile Mass (m)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the projectile (e.g., bullet) in kilograms

inputs.label: Pendulum Mass (M)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the pendulum bob in kilograms

inputs.label: Pendulum Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the pendulum arm from pivot to center of mass in meters

inputs.label: Maximum Swing Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum angle of swing from the vertical, in degrees

inputs.label: Gravity (g)
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity, typically 9.81 m/s²
